visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan and a red top, holds a blue passport and an airline ticket while walking through a bright, modern airport hallway. She smiles broadly and talks directly to the camera in a selfie perspective. The scene cuts to a close-up of the ticket and then to a meal tray on an airplane containing meat, fries, and a salad. (2) Back at the airport, she is greeted by a man in a professional white shirt and tie holding a sign with a red 'N' logo. She gets into the back of a luxury black Mercedes van with leather seats. The lighting is natural and bright. (3) The van arrives at the 'Fairmont Ambassador Seoul' hotel. Inside the lobby, she encounters staff dressed in pink jumpsuits and black masks with geometric shapes, mimicking the 'Squid Game' characters. She poses for a selfie with one of them, looking excited. (4) She receives a gift card and a Tiffany & Co. bag. She enters her hotel room, which features two large beds covered in 'Squid Game' themed merchandise, including snacks, a green tracksuit, and a personalized letter. She shows a box of chocolates and a snack pack to the camera. (5) After a costume change into a floral dress, she walks through a crowded, high-end hotel lobby. She visits 'Dahlia Dining,' a restaurant by Chef Choi Hyun-seok. Multiple dishes are shown, including grilled skewers, creamy soup with scallops, and mapo tofu. A coaster with the Netflix logo is visible. (6) She stands in a luxurious bathroom with marble walls and warm lighting, addressing the camera with energetic hand gestures. B-roll of her eating and reacting to the food is interspersed with her talking head segments.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: NETFLIX. [Slogan]: 招待我回家 24小時能花多少?. [Variety]: (韓星採訪者). [Subtitle]: Netflix叫我回韓國. (2) [Slogan]: 飛機票 $14,000NT. [Subtitle]: 立馬看看飛機餐. 順便說, 我的新護照很好看吧. (3) [Subtitle]: 一到韓國. 有禮車司機來接我耶!. [Slogan]: 私人接送 $800NT. [Subtitle]: 第一次搭禮車!!!. (4) [Subtitle]: 到了5星級飯店. [Slogan]: 5星級飯店 $10,700NT/晚. [Logo]: Fairmont AMBASSADOR SEOUL. (5) [Subtitle]: 蛤?...士兵?. [Variety]: (害羞). [Subtitle]: 你後面!!!. 歡迎光臨.... [Variety]: (有點怕怕). (6) [Subtitle]: 整間五星級飯店直接打造成《魷魚遊戲》, 好扯. 從Lobby一直送禮物. [Slogan]: 周邊禮物 $3000NT. [Variety]: (有環自己預測?). (7) [Subtitle]: 甚至飯店還準備了親筆信跟巧克力送給我, 超貼心!. 但其實我只要來便利商店就已經超開心了. [Slogan]: 零食費 $??? NT. [Subtitle]: 零食費用, 讓大家猜猜看唷. (8) [Subtitle]: 換衣服後去吃晚餐!. 這裡是「黑白大廚」崔賢錫主廚的 Dahlia Dining. 是蔬食精緻料理餐廳. (9) [Subtitle]: 全素的料理竟然這麼好吃. 一道接一道的套餐根本吃不完, 我真的超飽的. [Slogan]: 黑白大廚晚餐 $4,000NT/桌. (10) [Subtitle]: 大家猜猜看我今天一整天下來總共花了Netflix多少錢?. 可以底下留言!!! **有抽獎**. 最接近正確答案的1位, 我會送你韓國化妝品. (11) [Subtitle]: 雖然這些都很高級又舒服而且是免費非常特別. 但能跟全球創作者們見面. 能聽到各種不同的故事. 對我來說也是收穫滿滿的一段時間!. (12) [Subtitle]: 如果好奇後續的主要活動的話請關注我的IG&YT. 總金額答案會在下一集公佈!!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 driver, 3 Squid Game soldiers, approximately 10 other guests and staff in the hotel and restaurant.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark wavy hair. She wears a white knit cardigan over a red top initially, then changes into a sleeveless floral print dress for the dinner segment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern airport hallways, the interior of a luxury van with plush seats, a grand 5-star hotel lobby with high ceilings and Netflix/Squid Game branding, a modern hotel suite, and a sophisticated restaurant with ambient lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin with a bright, enthusiastic tone. A fast-tempo electronic pop BGM runs continuously. A digital 'ding' SFX occurs when text overlays appear. (2) A transition is marked by a synthetic 'whoosh' sound as the scene shifts to the airport exit. The speaker's volume increases with excitement. (3) A distinct 'Squid Game' style alarm stinger (sharp, dissonant synthesized sound) plays when the masked soldiers appear. Background crowd chatter is faintly audible in the large hotel lobby. (4) The sound of rustling plastic is heard as she shows the snacks. The voice maintains a high arousal level. (5) Transition to the restaurant includes a soft 'pop' SFX. Muted clinking of plates and restaurant ambience is layered under the narration and BGM. (6) The concluding segment features the speaker at a slightly lower but still positive energy level, with the BGM concluding in a rhythmic fade.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Travel -> Arrival -> Accommodation -> Event -> Dining -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional travel vlog documenting a luxury experience hosted by Netflix in Seoul, themed around 'Squid Game.' It aims to generate excitement for Netflix content and showcase the high-end hospitality associated with the brand while engaging the audience with a guessing game about the total cost.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions Netflix throughout, uses Netflix logos, and revolves entirely around a Netflix-sponsored trip and themed events.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, vertically-formatted social media vlog designed for high engagement, utilizing popular TV show themes (Squid Game, Black and White Chef) to anchor the content.
